name: Void Crawler
description: Something adapted to the deep places where the Void Crystal — the Black Aetherium, the drained lattice left by the Cascade — is densest. It looks like it was once insectoid and has been through several iterations since. The eyes are gone; it navigates by the resonance field generated by the active crystals around it, which means the Grid restart eight months ago woke more of them than anyone anticipated. They move in low-light conditions at unsettling speed, attack with serrated forelimbs that drain warmth from the wound, and they are drawn to the body heat of the living with a precision that suggests the absence of heat in their own bodies.

abilities.name: Heat Drain
abilities.description: A full-body strike using all six forelimbs simultaneously, designed to maximize contact area. Each wound bleeds cold — the surrounding tissue loses warmth over the next several seconds.
